name: What's the process to complain about AI use in my case?
description: State bar grievance; free and straightforward.

mainEntity.name: What's the process to complain about AI use in my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: State bar grievance; free and straightforward.
acceptedAnswer.description: File ethics grievance with state bar. Context: Investigates negligence; free process. Key factors: Evidence of breach, timeline (1-2 years). Practical guidance: Submit online form, include docs, follow up. May lead to discipline.
